hooks.command: case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *pip\ install*|*pip3\ install*|*poetry\ *) echo 'BLOCK: Use uv, not pip or poetry (invariant I-15). Run: uv add <package>' >&2; exit 1;; esac
FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.py) cd /Users/sethurama/DEV/LM/learning-mate/backend && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20;; esac; exit 0
